title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Baxter India International Enterprises in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India International Enterprises:
Baxter India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India International Enterprises!
